current_baseline.latest_accepted_milestone: Daily Coach Async Provider Runtime QA Hardening v1
current_baseline.prior_accepted_milestone: Daily Coach Async Provider Runtime Prototype v1 — Developer Mode Only

active_roadmap.current_authorized_milestone: Daily Coach Async Approved Preview Bridge Design v1
active_roadmap.current_authorized_status: AUTHORIZED FOR DESIGN / BACKEND ARCHITECTURE SUPPORT
active_roadmap.current_authorized_scope: Design-only approved preview bridge architecture; no implementation
active_roadmap.recommended_next_milestone_after_accepta: Daily Coach Async Approved Preview Bridge Implementation v1 — Feature Flag Disabled by Default
active_roadmap.next_milestone_reason: Implement only after Architecture accepts the bridge design; Today provider execution remains unauthorized.

linux: Linux runtime uses Windows Ollama over LAN

commands.app: Windows PowerShell command that talks to Linux over SSH and restarts FastAPI + Streamlit there

model_provider_policy.qwen3_32b: research / future premium async candidate only
model_provider_policy.model_promotion: No model promoted without Architecture approval.
model_provider_policy.boundary: Backend owns truth; provider proposes language; validator decides display safety.

daily_coach_async_boundary.current: Approved preview bridge design authorized; design only, normal Today behavior remains unchanged, and no public/default async narrative display is implemented
in_current_scope: normal UI versus Developer Mode metadata boundary
deferred: approved preview bridge implementation after design acceptance
normal Today preview behind disabled-by-default flag
provider live QA remains Developer Mode-only unless separately authorized
worker / queue / scheduler / polling remains unauthorized
not_authorized: Today preview bridge implementation before design acceptance

codex_assisted_flow.backend_user_role: review, validate, stage explicit files, commit, push, snapshot, Linux pull, and hand off to Architecture after Codex finishes
codex_assisted_flow.default: chat-driven Backend implementation using apply scripts/patches

workflow_rules.feature_flow: commit -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull feature
workflow_rules.main_flow: merge -> validate -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull main

definition_of_done: project memory updated when behavior, architecture, tests, UI, provider behavior, persistence, routing, runtime commands, or accepted status changes
